_comment: Phase 4.2 — S3 bucket policy that lets CloudTrail (and only CloudTrail) deliver log files. GetBucketAcl lets CloudTrail check the bucket; PutObject is constrained to the AWSLogs/<acct> prefix and requires bucket-owner-full-control plus aws:SourceArn = the trail ARN (confused-deputy guard). Replace BUCKET, ACCOUNT_ID, REGION, TRAIL_NAME. For an organization trail to a log-archive account, broaden the key path to AWSLogs/<orgId>/* and add aws:SourceAccount. Used by scripts/phase-4/setup_org_cloudtrail.py.
